raw or public input: 10x integer UMI counts matched to scanpy PBMC3k processed-cell labels
cell-level quality control and subset ru: all 2,638 matched cells retained; no additional cell exclusion after matching
gene filter: genes required in at least three cells
normalisation and transform: library-size normalisation to 10,000 counts per cell followed by log1p for geometric methods; scaled with clipping at 10 for PCA
feature selection: all 1,838 retained genes because fewer than 2,000 remained
method-fitting inputs: integer counts for GLM-PCA; normalised/scaled PCA50 for PCA, UMAP, PHATE, t-SNE and PaCMAP; method-specific transformed count matrices for scScope and SAUCIE
reference and evaluation representation: 50-component PCA reference; k=15 neighbourhoods; 5,000 seeded cell pairs for global-rank diagnostics
post-fit evaluation metadata: louvain labels used only for marker, same-label-neighbour and rare-state diagnostics
missing-value and exclusion rule: undefined diagnostics excluded; no value imputed

raw or public input: public count matrix and paul15_clusters annotations from scanpy.datasets.paul15
gene filter: genes required in at least three cells
normalisation and transform: library-size normalisation to 10,000 counts per cell followed by log1p; scaled with clipping at 10 for PCA
feature selection: top 2,000 highly variable genes using the Seurat variance method
method-fitting inputs: integer counts for GLM-PCA; normalised/scaled PCA50 for PCA, UMAP, PHATE, t-SNE and PaCMAP; method-specific transformed count matrices for scScope and SAUCIE
reference and evaluation representation: 50-component PCA reference; k=15 neighbourhoods; diffusion-pseudotime reference; 5,000 seeded cell pairs for global-rank diagnostics
post-fit evaluation metadata: paul15_clusters and reference pseudotime used only after fitting
missing-value and exclusion rule: diagnostics without a meaningful reference excluded; no value imputed

raw or public input: 18,641-cell public scvi-tools package object with cell_type and donor metadata
cell-level quality control and subset ru: deterministic 8,000-cell subset; all cell types with no more than 200 source-object cells retained, then sampling within cell_type by donor strata
gene filter: genes required in at least three selected cells
normalisation and transform: library-size normalisation to 10,000 counts per cell followed by log1p; scaled with clipping at 10 for PCA
feature selection: top 2,000 highly variable genes using the Seurat variance method
method-fitting inputs: integer counts for GLM-PCA; normalised/scaled PCA50 for PCA, UMAP, PHATE, t-SNE and PaCMAP; method-specific transformed count matrices for scScope and SAUCIE
reference and evaluation representation: 50-component PCA reference; k=15 neighbourhoods; 5,000 seeded cell pairs for global-rank diagnostics
labels or covariates during fitting: none; cell_type and donor were used only to construct the deterministic diagnostic subset
post-fit evaluation metadata: cell_type and donor used after fitting for identity, donor-entropy and rare-state diagnostics
missing-value and exclusion rule: undefined diagnostics excluded; no value imputed
